text_blocks.text: New Haven is served by the daily New
Haven Register, the weekly "alternative" New
Haven Advocate (which is run by Tribune, the
corporation owning the Hartford Courant), the
online daily New Haven Independent, and the
monthly Grand News Community Newspaper.
Downtown New Haven is covered by an in-depth
civic news forum, Design New Haven. The Register
also backs PLAY magazine, a weekly
entertainment publication. The city is also served
by several student-run papers, including the Yale
Daily News, the weekly Yale Herald and a
humor tabloid, Rumpus Magazine. WTHl Channel
8, the ABC affiliate for Connecticut, WCTX
Channel 59, the MyNetworkTV affiliate for the
state, and Connecticut Public Television station
WEDY channel 65, a PBS affiliate, broadcast
from New Haven. All New York City news and
sports team stations broadcast to New Haven
County.
